explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.findings: Sources describe documented external accountability practices in 1 source(s). Additional documentation references related practices.

relevant_sources.summary: This privacy policy document provides evidence for **external_accountability, governance, oversight, privacy, and transparency**. It supports **governance** by outlining policies for third-party vendor data use, and **transparency** and **privacy** by detailing the use of automated technologies for tracking and tailoring content. Furthermore, the policy demonstrates **privacy** by defining profiling practices and **oversight** by describing user rights for opting out of targeted advertising and an appeal process.
relevant_sources.title: Republic Services Privacy Policy

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: The Republic Services 10-K Annual Report (FY2024) discusses automation and collaboration with manufacturers, indicating governance over technology integration and the implementation of safety features within AI-enabled systems. Additionally, the company's privacy policy outlines policies for third-party vendor data use.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: The Republic Services 10-K Annual Report (FY2024) provides evidence for the **governance** pillar of responsible AI. The report's discussion of automation and collaboration with manufacturers indicates governance over technology integration and the implementation of safety features within their AI-enabled systems.
relevant_sources.title: Republic Services 10-K Annual Report (FY2024)

transparency.findings: The Republic Services 2024 Sustainability Report mentions vision-recognition technology, describing its capabilities and outlining its function for AI-powered sorting at recycling facilities. Additionally, the company's privacy policy details the use of automated technologies for tracking and tailoring content.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: The "Republic Services 2024 Sustainability Report" provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. This is because the report mentions vision-recognition technology and its capabilities, describing a use case for AI-powered sorting at recycling facilities. While it outlines the technology's function, it does not detail the governance or operational execution surrounding its implementation.
relevant_sources.title: Republic Services 2024 Sustainability Report

summary.overall_findings: Republic Services' public disclosures address transparency through its 2024 Sustainability Report, which mentions vision-recognition technology and its capabilities, and oversight through its privacy policy, which describes user rights for opting out of targeted advertising. Overall, 5 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars have documented evidence, with privacy and governance also addressed at the policy level. The privacy policy further details the use of automated technologies for tracking and tailoring content, while the 10-K Annual Report indicates governance over technology integration within AI-enabled systems. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness or explainability, based on a review of 12 publicly available sources.
